title: 'Alien-obsessed' JD Vance believes UFO sightings are actually 'demons'
description: US Vice President JD Vance told a podcast host in the US that he thinks UFO sightings can be explained by "demons" and that they could be one of the "devil’s great tricks"

title: Read the Pentagon’s UFO Report to Congress
description: An unclassified version of the Pentagon’s report on Unidentified Aerial Phenomena (UAPs, aka UFOs) was sent to Congress on Friday, and you can read a full copy here.

title: Congressman Issues Alert: Top Scientists Found Dead After Testifying About UFO Files
description: A Republican congressman is raising alarms after a string of scientists tied to UFO research and advanced technologies have died or vanished under mysterious circumstances, just as the Trump administration moves toward releasing long-classified UFO files. Rep. Tim Burchett (R-TN) warned this week that the pattern is too serious to ignore. “Something dark is going [...] The post Congressman Issues Alert: Top Scientists Found Dead After Testifying About UFO Files appeared first on CBNC .

title: Bill Maher quips that UFO skeptics are now the ones who sound like 'conspiracy theorists' on aliens
description: Fox News Channel offers its audiences in-depth news reporting, along with opinion and analysis encompassing the principles of free people, free markets and diversity of thought, as an alternative to the left-of-center offerings of the news marketplace.

title: Bill Maher quips that UFO skeptics are now the ones who sound like 'conspiracy theorists' on aliens
description: Bill Maher says credible military and government UAP sightings have shifted his views on alien life, quipping that skeptics now sound like conspiracy theorists.
